spec.description: Monitor Ballerina HTTP/HTTPs Services, HTTP Clients and SQL Clients

spec.legendFormat: Instance: {{instance}}, Method: {{http_method}}, Peer Address: {{peer_address}}, Service Name: {{entrypoint_service_name}}
Instance: {{instance}}, Method: {{http_method}}, Peer Address: {{peer_address}}, Service Name: {{entrypoint_service_name}}
Instance: {{instance}}, Source Object Name: {{src_object_name}}, Source Function Name: {{src_function_name}}
Instance: {{instance}}, Quantile: {{quantile}}, Time Window: {{timeWindow}}, Service Name: {{entrypoint_service_name}}, Function Name: {{entrypoint_function_name}}
Instance: {{instance}}, Action: {{action}}, Method: {{http_method}}, Peer Address: {{peer_address}}, URL: {{http_url}}

spec.expr: ((sum( max_over_time(requests_total_value{ instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",http_status_code_group="4xx",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]) - min_over_time(requests_total_value{ instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",http_status_code_group="4xx",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]))) OR vector(0)) + ((sum(max_over_time(requests_total_value{ instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",http_status_code_group="5xx",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]) - min_over_time(requests_total_value{instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",http_status_code_group="5xx",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]))) OR vector(0))

((sum( max_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient",http_status_code_group="4xx"}[1m]) - min_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient",http_status_code_group="4xx"}[1m])) OR vector(0)) + ((sum(max_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient",http_status_code_group="5xx"}[1m]) - min_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient",http_status_code_group="5xx"}[1m])) OR  vector(0) )))*100 / sum( max_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]) - min_over_time({__name__=~"requests_total_value", instance=~"$instance", src_function_name=~"$src_function_name",src_object_name="ballerina/http/HttpClient"}[1m]))

spec.title: Service API Metrics
